steps.title: Use the shade action
steps.content: The line says the speaker "drew the shades far down" before getting into bed. In this context, the word describes the physical act of moving the window shades downward.

steps.title: Reject other meanings
steps.content: B can describe drawing liquid away, but shades are not drained. C can mean elicited or inspired, which does not fit a physical action. D means sketched, but no picture is being made. The answer is A.
